LanguageData.ScramSRP_VectorRadiusGrowthMultiplierDes: Affects the speed at which the radius of vectors grows. Radius growth affects when parasites will begin appearing. Note that this does NOT affect the rate at which parasites infect the worldmap.
LanguageData.ScramSRP_VectorInfectionGrowthMultiplier: Affects how fast vectors will infect the world around them.
LanguageData.ScramSRP_WorldInfectionDifficultyModifie: Affects how fast world infection will spread over tiles, and how much. Lower number = faster spread.
LanguageData.ScramSRP_MeteorMaxDistanceDesc: The maximum distance (in tiles) from your starting colony the first meteor will drop.
LanguageData.ScramSRP_VectorMeteorDropDayDesc: How many days it takes for the meteor to drop.
LanguageData.ScramSRP_ParasiteEnrageChanceDesc: The chance that parasites will cause others on the map to enrage when killed.
